source_of_truth.text: When the Authorization header is missing or the token is invalid, the API returns 401 Unauthorized.

decision.documented_expected: 401 Unauthorized when the Authorization header is missing or invalid
decision.observed: 200 OK with the full user object returned

source_of_truth.text: Default limit is 30. Passing --limit 0 returns all products with no cap.

other_matches.text: A limit of 0 returns up to a maximum of 100 products.

decision.documented_expected: limit=0 returns all products with no cap
decision.observed: All 194 products are returned in a single response
Tags returned in insertion order, not alphabetical

source_of_truth.text: The accessToken expires after expiresInMins minutes (default 60).

decision.documented_expected: accessToken expires after expiresInMins minutes, default 60
decision.observed: Token remained valid past 31 minutes and only expired at 60 minutes
